summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CleverBakes Best Sellers feature. Backend API fully functional with 96.8% success rate. Frontend displays Best Sellers section, filter tabs, and badges correctly. Admin dashboard flame icon toggle works perfectly. Minor initial seeding issue resolved during testing.

minor_bugs.issue: Bestseller toggle endpoint doesn't properly reject unauthorized requests
minor_bugs.impact: Security concern - should return 401 for non-authenticated requests

resolved_issues.issue: Initially showed 4 bestsellers instead of expected 5
resolved_issues.resolution: Ube Cheesecake was not marked as bestseller in database. Fixed by toggling in admin dashboard.

passed_tests: Menu page Best Sellers section display
Best seller badges on product cards
Admin Products table flame icon toggle
Category filters (All, Best Sellers, Cakes, Cookies, Breads & Pastries, Brownies)
Backend CRUD operations for products, categories, orders, reviews
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authorization check in PUT /api/products/{id}/bestseller endpoint to properly reject unauthorized requests (should return 401 status code)
